bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has released the event schedule for the Undergraduate "Wishlist" for the Fall 2026 semester.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice of award has been issued for B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2, indicating a recent announcement regarding a project or procurement.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has published a recruitment notice, signaling new employment opportunities.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University recently organized a seminar aimed at raising awareness about cervical cancer among its community.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has launched an 'Eco-Friendly Cafeteria' initiative to encourage and promote sustainable choices among students and staff.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A law graduate from BRAC University has been granted a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship by the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.
